title: SharedSetting
content:
# SharedSetting


## Properties

- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Shared Setting was created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **created_by** (`string`): The User who created the Shared Setting, represented by a KRN.
- **payload** (`object`): The Shared Settings. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of Shared Setting being defined.
- **setting_name** (`string`): Unique identifier Shared Setting key `setting_name`.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Shared Setting keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **updated_by** (`string`): The User who updated the Shared Setting, represented by a KRN.
summary: Object with properties: created, created_by, payload, setting_name, updated

created.description: UTC time when the Shared Setting was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

created_by.description: The User who created the Shared Setting, represented by a KRN.

payload.description: The Shared Settings. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of Shared Setting being defined.

updated.description: UTC time when any Shared Setting keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated_by.description: The User who updated the Shared Setting, represented by a KRN.
